caption: In a setting with green upholstered seating, two men are visible. One man wears a green short-sleeved shirt and a white face mask, while the other wears a dark suit jacket, a white shirt, a gold tie, and a dark face mask. In the background, signs with red "X X X" marks and the text "DO NOT SIT" are visible. Overlaid on the footage are a "plustv" logo and a news banner stating "NEWS NOW" and "JUSUN STRIKE," followed by "REPS URGE FG TO ENSURE SPEEDY RESOLUTION." A URL is also displayed, changing from "www.youtube.com/plustvafrica" to "www.plustvafrica.com/liive-tv." Across the sequence, the man in the green shirt is seen looking toward the other man and gesturing with his hand, while the man in the suit remains relatively still, looking forward. The camera angle remains consistent, capturing the two men from the chest up.
